hero.title: Francesco Cambareri
hero.subtitle: Calisthenics Personal Trainer
hero.lead: Bodyweight strength has a story over a century long. Every pull-up, every planche, every Indian-club swing carries an inheritance of discipline, elegance and patience. This is my gym.

manifesto.title: A manifesto, not a method
manifesto.p1: Training the body means training the character. The images on this page tell a century and a half of calisthenics: from Sandow to the athletes of Hamburg 1902, from Prague's Sokol to the schoolyards of 1970s England.
manifesto.p2: Calisthenics isn't a trend. It is a grammar of movement that crosses generations. My job is to give it back to anyone who wants to build lasting strength.

gallerySection.title: Visual Archive
gallerySection.subtitle: A selection of public-domain photographs and illustrations, interleaved with the work of @vintage_calisthenics.

about.title: About
about.lead: I'm Francesco Cambareri. Twenty-four years old. I teach calisthenics.

section1.title: An ancient practice
section1.body: I work with the unloaded body because I think calisthenics is the most honest form of training: there are no weights to hide behind, only your mass, gravity and technique. Three things which, put together, build a life.

section2.title: What I offer
section2.body: Personalised programmes built from your actual starting point. I teach the skills — pull-up, dip, planche, front lever, handstand — on top of a solid base of strength, mobility and proprioception.

section3.title: Who it's for
section3.body: For anyone tired of commercial gyms. For anyone who wants to learn a craft of the body. For anyone who believes that physical form is not a quick service but a slow art.

services.title: Services

online.name: Online
online.desc: Personalised programme, weekly sessions, video feedback, continuous contact. Works if you can train on your own.

inPerson.name: In-person
inPerson.desc: 1-to-1 sessions in the park or in outdoor gyms. Calisthenics lives on contact: posture cannot be corrected through a video.

hybrid.name: Hybrid
hybrid.desc: One in-person session a month plus online follow-up. The best way to combine continuity and technical correction.

services.cta: Get in touch for a quote

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.lead: My gym has no walls. Photos of sessions, students' progress and the places where I train. Historical images live next to today's.
gallery.comingSoonText: I'm putting together photos of in-person sessions, students' progress and the places I train. I'll keep updating this page.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: For a programme, a trial session, or just to talk. I reply within 48 hours.

footer.credits: Archival images: Wikimedia Commons, Wellcome Collection, Library of Congress (public domain).
